sentence_reviews.text: Continual and test-time adaptation update a model, memory, statistics, or prompts as distributions and tasks change after the initial training run.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Tent arXiv abstract lines 38-39 says a model adapts itself to new and different data during testing, estimates normalization statistics, and optimizes affine transformations online on each batch; Snell arXiv abstract lines 42-45 discusses inference-time compute and adaptively updating the model's response distribution at test time.
sentence_reviews.notes: Model/statistics/test-time response adaptation is supported; memory and prompts are broader than the inspected sources.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Continual learning & test-time adaptation pipelines is to connect Continual & online learning, In-context & test-time learning to downstream capabilities including Knowledge editing & memory consolidation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Tent lines 38-39 supports online test-time optimization on batches; Snell lines 42-45 supports test-time compute, search/verifier methods, and adaptive response distribution updates. Knowledge editing and memory consolidation are not directly evidenced.
sentence_reviews.notes: Continual/online and test-time learning links are supported; downstream knowledge editing/memory consolidation needs separate support.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Knowledge editing & memory consolidation
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Tent supports test-time adaptation of statistics/parameters, but no inspected source addresses knowledge editing or memory consolidation.
sentence_reviews.notes: No adequate support in inspected packet or additional sources.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Tent arXiv abstract line 38 describes updating online on each batch during fully test-time adaptation.
sentence_reviews.notes: Directly supported for online test-time adaptation.

sentence_reviews.text: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Continual & online learning, In-context & test-time learning.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Snell lines 43-45 discusses fixed inference-time compute, difficulty-dependent effectiveness, and compute-optimal allocation; Tent lines 38-39 supports test-time optimization. Generic data/random/contamination sensitivity is not directly stated.
sentence_reviews.notes: Compute and adaptation dependencies are supported; generic limitation wording is overbroad.

sentence_reviews.text: Continual learning & test-time adaptation pipelines uses Continual & online learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Tent arXiv abstract line 38 describes online updates on each batch during test-time adaptation.

sentence_reviews.text: Continual learning & test-time adaptation pipelines uses In-context & test-time learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Snell lines 42-45 discusses test-time computation and adaptive response distributions; Tent lines 38-39 supports fully test-time adaptation.

sentence_reviews.text: Continual learning & test-time adaptation pipelines uses Supervised fine-tuning & instruction tuning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Ouyang supports SFT for instruction following; Tent and Snell support test-time adaptation, but no inspected source connects SFT as a common ingredient for continual/test-time adaptation pipelines.
sentence_reviews.notes: SFT can be part of adaptation pipelines, but this dependency is not directly established.

edge_reviews.notes: Online batch updates during test-time adaptation directly support the relationship and core strength.
Test-time compute/adaptation directly supports this core dependency.
SFT is plausible for some pipelines but not established as a common dependency by inspected evidence.
